# CLI Command Reference

Version: 0.1.0

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| [`dev start`](start.md) | Create a Git work branch from a synchronized base |
| [`dev feature-skill-install`](feature-skill-install.md) | Install the feature skill and initialize project context |
| [`dev feature-skill-install-kiro`](feature-skill-install-kiro.md) | Install the feature skill for Kiro and initialize project context |
| [`dev status`](status.md) | Show repository and branch status |
| [`dev model-toggle`](model-toggle.md) | Switch the active model-naming profile for installed subagents |
